title: My Goal football
overview: Goli (Gulshan) is a poor boy in a Jammu village who dreams of becoming a Football player. Circumstances however lead him to take up his father's profession of painting statues. Now in his late 20s he bumps into Rekha, another passionate football player who has been married off at a young age. She however continues to play street Football with village children, coaching and encouraging them to "play the sport".
